message:
fix(freeze): resolve CI build errors in WASM component integration

Fixed multiple compilation issues found by CI:

1. Added quickjs-libc.h include to generated frozen_functions.c header
   - Resolves undeclared js_std_dump_error function error
   - Modified frozen_registry.zig to include header in generation

2. Fixed wasmComponentCallWrapper calling convention and signature
   - Changed to callconv(.c) to match JSCFunctionData type
   - Added magic and data parameters for closure data access
   - Replaced JS_GetActiveFunction (doesn't exist) with JS_NewCFunctionData approach

3. Updated __edgebox_load_wasm_component to use closure data
   - Pass component_id and export_name via JSValue array
   - Wrapper function extracts data from closure instead of function properties

All builds now pass: zig build cli -Dsource-dir=bench succeeds

files.patch:
@@ -450,6 +450,7 @@ pub fn generateModuleC(
         \\// Generated by Zig freeze system
         \\
         \\#include "quickjs.h"
+        \\#include "quickjs-libc.h"
         \\
         \\
     , .{module_name}) catch return error.FormatError;
@@ -715,6 +716,7 @@ fn generateModuleCWithManifest(
         \\// Generated by Zig freeze system
         \\
         \\#include "quickjs.h"
+        \\#include "quickjs-libc.h"
         \\
         \\
     , .{module_name}) catch return error.FormatError;
